# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Create a Vercel Edge Function that streams responses to clients. Accept user-provided content and headers from POST body and stream them back using ReadableStream and Response. This enables our real-time data streaming API at the edge. Use the Web Streams API to pipe user data directly to the response.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import type { VercelRequest, VercelResponse } from "@vercel/node";

export const config = {
  runtime: "edge",
};

type Body = {
  content?: unknown;
  headers?: Record<string, string>;
  status?: number;
  delayMsPerChunk?: number;
  chunkSize?: number;
};

const HOP_BY_HOP_HEADERS = new Set([
  "connection",
  "keep-alive",
  "proxy-authenticate",
  "proxy-authorization",
  "te",
  "trailer",
  "transfer-encoding",
  "upgrade",
]);

function sanitizeHeaders(input?: Record<string, string>): Headers {
  const h = new Headers();
  if (!input) return h;

  for (const [k, v] of Object.entries(input)) {
    const key = k.toLowerCase().trim();
    if (!key || HOP_BY_HOP_HEADERS.has(key)) continue;
    if (key === "content-length") continue;
    try {
      h.set(key, String(v));
    } catch {
      // ignore invalid header
    }
  }
  return h;
}

function toStringContent(content: unknown): string {
  if (content == null) return "";
  if (typeof content === "string") return content;
  if (typeof content === "number" || typeof content === "boolean" || typeof content === "bigint")
    return String(content);
  try {
    return JSON.stringify(content);
  } catch {
    return String(content);
  }
}

function sleep(ms: number): Promise<void> {
  return new Promise((r) => setTimeout(r, ms));
}

export default async function handler(req: Request): Promise<Response> {
  if (req.method !== "POST") {
    return new Response("Method Not Allowed", {
      status: 405,
      headers: { allow: "POST" },
    });
  }

  let body: Body = {};
  try {
    body = (await req.json()) as Body;
  } catch {
    return new Response("Invalid JSON body", { status: 400 });
  }

  const status =
    typeof body.status === "number" && body.status >= 100 && body.status <= 599 ? body.status : 200;

  const headers = sanitizeHeaders(body.headers);
  if (!headers.has("content-type")) headers.set("content-type", "text/plain; charset=utf-8");
  headers.set("cache-control", headers.get("cache-control") ?? "no-store");
  headers.set("x-content-type-options", "nosniff");

  const content = toStringContent(body.content);
  const chunkSize =
    typeof body.chunkSize === "number" && body.chunkSize > 0 ? Math.floor(body.chunkSize) : 1024;
  const delayMsPerChunk =
    typeof body.delayMsPerChunk === "number" && body.delayMsPerChunk >= 0
      ? Math.floor(body.delayMsPerChunk)
      : 0;

  const encoder = new TextEncoder();
  const stream = new ReadableStream<Uint8Array>({
    async start(controller) {
      try {
        for (let i = 0; i < content.length; i += chunkSize) {
          const slice = content.slice(i, i + chunkSize);
          controller.enqueue(encoder.encode(slice));
          if (delayMsPerChunk > 0) await sleep(delayMsPerChunk);
        }
        controller.close();
      } catch (e) {
        controller.error(e);
      }
    },
  });

  return new Response(stream, { status, headers });
}
